notification.welcome: Welcome to **Claude**! Go to the app settings to configure your Anthropic API key.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your Anthropic API key. You can find or create one at console.anthropic.com.

model.title: Default Model
model.description: The Claude model to use by default. Individual flow cards can override this.

max_tokens.title: Max Tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens in Claude's response. Higher values allow longer responses.

homey_mcp.title: Homey MCP
homey_mcp.description: Connect to your Homey via MCP to give Claude access to your devices and flows. After connecting, use the "Ask Claude with Homey context" flow card.
